description: Describes a trait that MAY be applied to a Channel Object. This object MAY contain any property from the Channel Object, except the address, messages and traits ones.

title.description: A human-friendly title for the channel.

description.description: A longer description of the channel. CommonMark is allowed.

bindings.description: A map where the keys describe the name of the protocol and the values describe protocol-specific definitions for the channel.

externalDocs.description: Additional external documentation for this channel.

summary.description: A brief summary of the channel.

servers.description: The references of the servers on which this channel is available.

parameters.description: A map of the parameters included in the channel address.

tags.description: A list of tags for logical grouping of channels.
